caption: A news report from News18 India features a graphic about Bihar politics with several portraits of political figures against a light-colored background. A central illustration shows a silhouette of a man in a white kurta walking towards a spotlight. The red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and a yellow ticker at the bottom states "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Various figures are pictured, including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". As the sequence progresses, the individuals featured in the side panels change. In the first frame, the right side shows portraits of Dr. Prem Kumar and Vijay Chaudhary. Later frames introduce different figures such as "सशक्त चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". The screen also displays text labels like "उप 72 वर्ष 9वीं बार CM" and "उप 34 वर्ष पूर्व हिंदी CM", while a clock in the corner consistently shows "10:01 PM".
